name: dynamic-forms
description: JSON-spec-driven form configuration engine that renders complete forms from a schema, supporting arrays, objects, accordions, and 30+ input types.
when_to_use: JSON-spec-driven form configuration engine that renders complete forms from a schema, supporting arrays, objects, accordions, and 30+ input types
avoid: Not for individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms. Not for dialog-based forms — use @gravity-ui/dialog-fields. Only justified when the form structure itself must be data-driven.

name: AccordeonCard
description: A collapsible accordion card component used as a layout element in dynamic forms. Renders a header with a toggle chevron and an animated body section that expands or collapses. Supports custom header actions, always-open mode, and configurable title sizes.
when_to_use: When grouping form fields inside a collapsible card with a visible header
When embedding form sections that can be toggled open or closed by the user
When using the 'accordeon_card' layout type in dynamicConfig
avoid: Do not use directly as an input component — it is a layout wrapper
Avoid when a non-collapsible section is preferred; use Card or Section instead

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the accordion body.

props.name: name
props.description: Identifier used for QA attributes on the toggle button.

props.name: header
props.description: Content displayed in the accordion header.

props.name: alwaysOpen
props.description: When true the body is always expanded and the toggle button is hidden.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the root element.

props.name: classNameBody
props.description: Additional CSS class for the body element.

props.name: description
props.description: Optional description rendered as HTML inside the header.

props.name: headerActionsTemplate
props.description: Extra content rendered in the header actions area alongside the toggle button.

props.name: ignoreHeaderToggle
props.description: When true clicking the header does not toggle the body.

props.name: onToggle
props.description: Callback fired when the open state changes.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state of the accordion.

props.name: titleSize
props.description: Size of the title text; defaults to 'm'.

examples: Settings}> Fields go here
Info} alwaysOpen> Always visible content

name: ArrayBase
description: A built-in array input component that renders each item using the spec's item sub-spec and an add-item button. Supports vertical or right-aligned add button positioning and optional item prefix labels between items. Used as the 'base' array input type in dynamicConfig.
when_to_use: When rendering an array of repeated form fields specified by ArraySpec
When the viewSpec.type is 'base' for an array field
avoid: Do not use when a tabular layout is needed — use TableArrayInput instead
Do not use for multi-select from an enum — use MultiSelect instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Array spec describing items sub-spec, constraints, and view options (type, itemLabel, addButtonPosition, itemPrefix).

props.name: name
props.description: Field name path used for QA attributes and child field names.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing value, onChange, onBlur, onFocus.

props.name: arrayInput
props.description: Array-specific helpers providing onItemAdd and onItemRemove callbacks and current array value.

props.name: meta
props.description: Final Form meta object used to detect child-level errors.

name: Card
description: A collapsible card with a header, optional title, description tooltip, and action slot. Built on top of GravityUI Card and Popover. Supports always-open mode, disabling header toggle, and empty-body detection to auto-hide the card border.
when_to_use: When displaying a titled, collapsible container for a group of form fields
When used as the layout component inside CardOneOf
avoid: Do not use as an input — it is a layout/container component
Avoid when a simple non-card section is needed — use Section or Row instead

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the card body.

props.name: name
props.description: Identifier used for QA attributes.

props.name: actions
props.description: Action elements rendered in the header right area.

props.name: alwaysOpen
props.description: When true the card is permanently expanded.

props.name: checkEmptyBody
props.description: When true detects an empty body and applies empty-body styling.

props.name: description
props.description: HTML description rendered via HelpMark tooltip.

props.name: disableHeaderToggle
props.description: Prevents clicking the header from toggling the body.

props.name: onToggle
props.description: Callback fired when the open state changes.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state.

props.name: title
props.description: Title content for the card header; string titles receive ellipsis truncation and a tooltip.

examples:
<Card name="profile" title="Profile" open={true} onToggle={setOpen}>
  <Text>Card body content</Text>
</Card>

<Card
  name="item"
  title="Item"
  actions={<Button view="flat" onClick={onRemove}><Icon data={TrashBin} /></Button>}
  alwaysOpen
>
  <Text>Item content</Text>
</Card>

name: CardOneOf
description: An object input component that combines the useOneOf toggler with a Card layout. Used for oneOf fields that need a card container with a header toggler and optional remove button when inside an array. Automatically opens when a validation error occurs inside the card body.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'card_oneof' for an object field
When a oneOf field should be displayed inside a collapsible card
avoid: Do not use when a flat or inline oneOf is preferred — use OneOf or OneOfFlat instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Object spec with properties for oneOf options. Each property key becomes a selectable option.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name path used for QA and child controller names.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing value, onChange, onBlur, onFocus, onDrop.

props.name: meta
props.description: Final Form meta object used by useErrorChecker to auto-open the card on submit errors.

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the toggler input; defaults to Row if not provided.

name: Checkbox
description: A boolean input component that wraps GravityUI Checkbox. Registered as the 'base' boolean input type in dynamicConfig. Reads and writes boolean values via the dynamic-forms field integration.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'base' for a boolean field
When a standard checkbox is needed for a true/false field
avoid: Do not use for toggle-style UI — use Switch instead
Do not use for multi-select from an array — use CheckboxGroup instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Boolean spec describing the field; viewSpec.disabled controls disabled state.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA attribute on the checkbox element.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing value, onChange, onBlur, onFocus.

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Additional GravityUI Checkbox props (excluding controlled props like checked, onChange, disabled, qa).

name: CheckboxGroup
description: An array input component that renders a group of checkboxes derived from the spec's enum values. Supports horizontal or vertical placement controlled by viewSpec.checkboxGroupParams.placement. Stores the selected values as an array.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'checkbox_group' for an array field with an enum
When users need to select multiple values from a fixed list using checkboxes
avoid: Do not use when single-select from an enum is needed — use RadioGroup or Select instead
Do not use when no enum is defined on the spec

props.name: spec
props.description: Array spec with enum defining available checkbox options. description map provides option labels. viewSpec.checkboxGroupParams.placement controls 'horizontal' (default) or 'vertical' layout.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA attributes on each checkbox.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing current array value and change handler.

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Additional GravityUI Checkbox props passed to each checkbox (excluding controlled props).

name: DateInput
description: A string input component that integrates GravityUI DatePicker for date/time selection. Supports multiple output formats: ISO string, custom format string, 'date_time', 'date', or 'timestamp' (seconds/nanos). Reads timezone and format from viewSpec.dateInput.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'date_input' for a string field
When the field stores a date or datetime as a string or timestamp object
avoid: Do not use for plain text fields — use Text instead
Avoid when the field type is not string

props.name: spec
props.description: String spec with viewSpec.dateInput providing outputFormat ('string' | 'date_time' | 'date' | 'timestamp' | custom), printFormat, and timeZone.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA attribute on the date picker element.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing current string value and change handler.

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Additional GravityUI DatePicker props (excluding value, disabled, placeholder, qa).

name: DynamicField
description: The main entry point for rendering a dynamic form field backed by React Final Form. Accepts a field name, a Spec describing the field schema, and a DynamicFormConfig mapping spec types to input and layout components. Provides context for config, Monaco editor, search, shared state, and mutators to all child components.
when_to_use: When embedding a JSON-schema-driven form field inside a React Final Form
When rendering any dynamic form field specified by a Spec
avoid: Do not use outside of a React Final Form context
Do not use when a read-only value display is needed — use DynamicView instead

props.name: name
props.description: Final Form field name used to bind the field to form state.

props.name: spec
props.description: JSON schema spec describing the field type, validation rules, and view configuration.

props.name: config
props.description: Configuration object mapping spec types to input and layout components.

props.name: destroyOnUnregister
props.description: Whether to destroy the field value when the component unmounts; defaults to true.

props.name: generateRandomValue
props.description: Function that generates a random value for string fields with the generate button enabled.

props.name: Monaco
props.description: Monaco editor component to use for monaco_input fields.

props.name: mutators
props.description: External mutator functions injected into the form context.

props.name: search
props.type: string | ((spec: Spec, input: FieldValue, name: string) => boolean)
props.description: Search string or function for filtering visible fields.

props.name: shared
props.description: Shared state object available to all child components via context.

props.name: storeSubscriber
props.description: Callback that receives the current field store on every change.

props.name: withoutInsertFFDebounce
props.description: Disables debouncing when syncing values into React Final Form.

name: DynamicView
description: The main entry point for rendering a read-only display of form values driven by a Spec and a DynamicViewConfig. Mirrors the structure of DynamicField but shows values rather than editable inputs. Supports an optional custom Link component for link-type fields.
when_to_use: When displaying a read-only overview of values that were collected with DynamicField
When a value preview driven by a Spec is needed without any editing capability
avoid: Do not use when the user needs to edit the values — use DynamicField instead

props.name: config
props.description: Configuration object mapping spec types to view and layout components.

props.name: spec
props.description: JSON schema spec describing the structure and view configuration.

props.name: value
props.description: The value to display.

props.name: Link
props.description: Custom component for rendering link-type fields.

props.name: Monaco
props.description: Monaco editor component for monaco_input view fields.

props.name: shared
props.description: Shared state object available to all child view components.

props.name: showLayoutDescription
props.description: When true layout descriptions are shown in view layouts.

name: FileInput
description: A string input component that renders a file upload button. Reads the selected file using a FileReader with a configurable readAsMethod and stores the result as a string value. Supports accept filter and an inline reset button.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'file_input' for a string field
When the user needs to upload a file whose contents are stored as a string in the form
avoid: Do not use for plain text entry — use Text or TextArea instead

props.name: spec
props.description: String spec with viewSpec.fileInput providing accept (file type filter) and readAsMethod ('readAsText' | 'readAsDataURL' | 'readAsArrayBuffer' | 'readAsBinaryString'). viewSpec.disabled controls the button disabled state.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA attributes on the upload and reset buttons.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing current value and onChange.

name: Group
description: A layout component derived from Section that renders a titled section with left-side indentation via GroupIndent. Exported in two size variants: Group (medium title) and Group2 (small title). Used as the 'group' and 'group2' layout types in dynamicConfig.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.layout is 'group' or 'group2' for any field type
When a titled section with left indentation of child fields is needed
avoid: Do not use when indentation is not wanted — use Section or Row instead

props.name: children
props.description: Field content rendered indented below the section title.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for error detection and remove button logic.

props.name: spec
props.description: Spec providing layoutTitle and layoutDescription for the section header.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object used to detect array item remove capability.

props.name: meta
props.description: Final Form meta object passed to ErrorWrapper for validation feedback.

name: GroupIndent
description: A simple layout utility component that adds a left-side visual indentation to its children. Used internally by Group and OneOf to visually nest sub-fields under a parent.
when_to_use: When sub-fields should be visually indented under a parent field or section
avoid: Avoid using directly when a full section or group layout is appropriate

props.name: children
props.description: Content to render with left-side indentation.

examples:
<GroupIndent>
  <DynamicField name="sub.field1" spec={fieldSpec1} config={dynamicConfig} />
  <DynamicField name="sub.field2" spec={fieldSpec2} config={dynamicConfig} />
</GroupIndent>

name: MonacoInput
description: A string input component that embeds a Monaco code editor with an optional dialog expand button. Reads language, fontSize, and other display options from viewSpec.monacoParams. Requires a Monaco editor component to be passed either via the DynamicField Monaco prop or the component's own MonacoComponent prop.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'monaco_input' for a string field
When a code or structured text editor with syntax highlighting is needed
avoid: Do not use without providing a Monaco editor component — renders nothing if missing
Do not use for plain single-line text — use Text instead

props.name: spec
props.description: String spec with viewSpec.monacoParams: language, fontSize, headerIconSize, headerIconIndent, headerTitleVariant, headerDialogButtonSize, headerDialogIconSize.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA attributes on the expand dialog button.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing current string value and onChange.

props.name: MonacoComponent
props.description: Monaco editor component to use. Falls back to the Monaco passed via DynamicField context if not provided.

props.name: withoutDialog
props.description: When true the expand-to-dialog button is hidden.

name: MultiOneOf
description: An object input that renders a multi-select dropdown to choose multiple active sub-properties simultaneously. Each selected property renders its Controller inline below the selector. Supports optional GroupIndent via the withoutIndent prop. The flat variant MultiOneOfFlat removes the indentation.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'multi_oneof' or 'multi_oneof_flat' for an object field
When multiple sub-properties of an object can be enabled simultaneously via a multi-select
avoid: Do not use when only one sub-property can be active at a time — use OneOf instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Object spec with properties map; each key appears as a selectable option in the multi-select. viewSpec.order controls option order. description provides per-option labels.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA attribute on the Select element.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing current object value and change/focus/blur handlers.

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the multi-select control.

props.name: withoutIndent
props.description: When true removes the GroupIndent wrapper around the selected property controllers (used by MultiOneOfFlat).

name: MultiSelect
description: An array input component that renders a multi-select dropdown populated from the spec's enum values. Converts between the internal array format and string arrays using transformArrIn/transformArrOut helpers. Used as the 'select' array input type in dynamicConfig.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'select' for an array field with an enum
When users need to select multiple values from a dropdown
avoid: Do not use for single-select — use Select instead
Do not use when checkbox-style multi-select is preferred — use CheckboxGroup instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Array spec with enum defining selectable options. description provides per-option labels. viewSpec.selectParams.meta adds secondary text per option. viewSpec.placeholder sets the select placeholder.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA attribute on the Select element.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing current array value and change/focus/blur handlers.

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Additional GravityUI Select props; set withCustomOptions:true and options to override the enum-derived options.

name: NumberWithScale
description: A string input component that pairs a text input with a scale unit selector (e.g. bytes/KB/MB). Stores the value in the base unit defined by defaultType in viewSpec.sizeParams. Automatically converts the displayed value when the scale dropdown changes.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'number_with_scale' for a string field
When the field stores a numeric value in a base unit but the user should be able to view and enter it in scaled units
avoid: Do not use when no sizeParams are defined in the spec — the component returns null
Do not use for plain number input without a scale — use NumInput instead

props.name: spec
props.description: String spec with viewSpec.sizeParams: defaultType (base unit key), scale (map of unit key to {factor: string, title: string}). Without sizeParams the component returns null.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA attributes on the text input and scale select.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing current string value and change/focus/blur handlers.

name: NumInput
description: A number input component that wraps GravityUI NumberInput. Registered as the 'base' number input type in dynamicConfig. Handles null-to-undefined conversion and passes min/max constraints from the spec.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'base' for a number field
When a standard numeric input is needed
avoid: Do not use for numbers stored as strings with a scale unit — use NumberWithScale instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Number spec with optional maximum, minimum constraints passed to NumberInput. viewSpec.disabled and viewSpec.placeholder are also applied.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA attribute on the NumberInput element.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing current numeric value and change/focus/blur handlers.

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Additional GravityUI NumberInput props (excluding value, onBlur, onFocus, onUpdate, disabled, placeholder, qa).

name: ObjectBase
description: An object input component that iterates over the spec's properties and renders a Controller for each one. Supports an optional inline rendering mode via ObjectInline for side-by-side fields. Respects viewSpec.order and viewSpec.delimiter for layout control. Shows an add button when the object value is undefined.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'base' or 'inline' for an object field
When a form section needs to render all properties of an ObjectSpec
avoid: Do not use when a oneOf/multi-oneof selection pattern is needed — use OneOf or MultiOneOf instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Object spec with properties map. viewSpec.order controls render order, viewSpec.delimiter provides per-property separator text, viewSpec.disabled hides the add button.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name path used for QA on the add button and as prefix for child field names.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object; when value is undefined the add button is shown.

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the properties content.

props.name: inline
props.description: When true renders properties side-by-side using ObjectInline filtering (used by ObjectInline export).

name: OneOf
description: An object input component that shows a toggler (radio group, select, checkbox, switch, or card) and renders the sub-spec of only the selected property. The toggler type is chosen automatically based on the number of options and viewSpec.oneOfParams.toggler. The flat variant OneOfFlat removes the GroupIndent wrapper.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'oneof' or 'oneof_flat' for an object field
When only one sub-property of an object should be active at a time
avoid: Do not use when multiple sub-properties can be active simultaneously — use MultiOneOf instead
Do not use when a card-based toggler layout is needed — use CardOneOf instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Object spec with properties; each key is a selectable option. viewSpec.oneOfParams.toggler forces a specific toggler type ('radio' | 'select' | 'checkbox' | 'switch' | 'card'). description map provides per-option labels.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name path used for QA and child controller names.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing current object value and change handler.

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the toggler element.

props.name: withoutIndent
props.description: When true removes the GroupIndent wrapper around the active sub-spec controller (used by OneOfFlat).

name: RadioGroup
description: A string input component that renders a GravityUI RadioGroup from the spec's enum values. Supports horizontal or vertical direction via viewSpec.radioGroupParams.direction and per-option disabled state. Used as the 'radio_group' string input type in dynamicConfig.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'radio_group' for a string field with an enum
When a small set of mutually exclusive options should be shown as radio buttons
avoid: Do not use for large enums — use Select instead for better UX
Do not use for multi-select — use CheckboxGroup or MultiSelect instead

props.name: spec
props.description: String spec with enum defining available options. description provides per-option labels. viewSpec.radioGroupParams.direction ('horizontal' | 'vertical') sets direction. radioGroupParams.disabled per-option disabling.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for the name and QA attributes on the RadioGroup element.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing current value and change/focus/blur handlers.

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Additional GravityUI RadioGroup props; set withCustomOptions:true and options to override the enum-derived options.

name: Row
description: A horizontal layout component that places the field label on the left and the input on the right. Displays a HelpMark tooltip for layoutDescription. Includes an inline remove button for array items and a GenerateRandomValueButton for string fields that have it enabled. RowVerbose variant shows the description below the input instead of in a tooltip.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.layout is 'row' or 'row_verbose' for any field type
When a classic label-left input-right form row layout is needed
avoid: Do not use when a vertical section layout is preferred — use Section instead

props.name: children
props.description: The input element rendered on the right side of the row.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA on the remove button and to detect array item status.

props.name: spec
props.description: Spec providing layoutTitle (label text), layoutDescription (help tooltip), required flag, and withGenerateButton flag.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing onDrop for array item removal and onChange for generate button.

props.name: meta
props.description: Final Form meta object passed to ErrorWrapper for inline validation messages.

name: Secret
description: An object input component designed for secret/credential fields. It expects the object spec to have a 'raw' property and renders only that sub-field with its layout forced to 'transparent'. Used as the 'secret' object input type in dynamicConfig.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'secret' for an object field that wraps a sensitive value under a 'raw' property
avoid: Do not use for a plain password text field — use Text with viewSpec.type='password' instead
Do not use when there is no 'raw' property in the object spec

props.name: spec
props.description: Object spec that must contain a 'raw' sub-property. The 'raw' property's spec can be any type; its layout is forced to 'transparent'.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name path used as prefix for the 'raw' child field name.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing current object value and change handler.

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the raw child field content.

name: Section
description: A vertical layout component that renders a titled section header above the field content. Available in multiple variants: Section (medium title), Section2 (small title), SectionWithSubtitle (description as subtitle), SectionWithSubtitle2, Group (with GroupIndent), Group2. Wraps children in ErrorWrapper for form validation feedback.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.layout is 'section', 'section2', 'group', or 'group2'
When a field or group of fields needs a visible title header above the inputs
avoid: Do not use when a side-by-side label-input layout is needed — use Row instead
import_statement: import { Section, Section2, SectionWithSubtitle, SectionWithSubtitle2, Group, Group2 } from '@gravity-ui/dynamic-forms'

props.name: children
props.description: Field content rendered below the section title.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for array item removal detection.

props.name: spec
props.description: Spec providing layoutTitle for the header, layoutDescription for the help mark or subtitle, and layoutProps.variantTitle to override typography.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object; onDrop used for array item remove button.

props.name: meta
props.description: Final Form meta object passed to ErrorWrapper; omitting disables validation feedback.

props.name: ignoreDescription
props.description: When true suppresses the layoutDescription help mark even if it is set.

name: Select
description: A string input component that renders a GravityUI Select populated from the spec's enum values. Automatically enables filtering when there are more than 9 options. Supports custom options and meta text for each option via selectParams. Used as the 'select' string input type in dynamicConfig.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'select' for a string field with an enum
When a single-value selection from a list is needed
avoid: Do not use for multi-select — use MultiSelect instead
Do not use for radio button style — use RadioGroup for small enums instead

props.name: spec
props.description: String spec with enum defining options. description provides per-option labels. viewSpec.selectParams.meta adds secondary text per option. viewSpec.placeholder sets the select placeholder. Filtering is auto-enabled for >9 options.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA attribute on the Select element.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing current value and change/focus/blur handlers.

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Additional GravityUI Select props; set withCustomOptions:true and options to override the enum-derived options.

name: Switch
description: A boolean input component that wraps GravityUI Switch. Registered as the 'switch' boolean input type in dynamicConfig. Reads and writes boolean values via the dynamic-forms field integration.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'switch' for a boolean field
When a toggle switch UI is preferred over a checkbox for a boolean value
avoid: Do not use for checkbox-style UI — use Checkbox instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Boolean spec; viewSpec.disabled controls the disabled state of the switch.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA attribute on the Switch element.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing current boolean value and change/focus/blur handlers.

name: TableArrayInput
description: An array input component that renders items in a GravityUI Table. Each row corresponds to an array item and each column corresponds to an object property defined in viewSpec.table. Requires items to be an ObjectSpec and table column definitions to be provided. Supports column widths and description tooltips per column.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'table' for an array field whose items are objects
When array data should be displayed and edited in a tabular format
avoid: Do not use when items are not objects — use ArrayBase instead
Do not use without viewSpec.table column definitions — the component returns null

props.name: spec
props.description: Array spec with items as ObjectSpec and viewSpec.table array defining columns: {property, label, description?, width?}. Without viewSpec.table the component renders null.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA attributes on add/remove row buttons.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing current array value and change handler.

props.name: arrayInput
props.description: Array-specific helpers providing onItemAdd and onItemRemove callbacks.

name: Text
description: A string (or number) input component that renders a GravityUI TextInput or PasswordInput. Used as the 'base' and 'password' string input types in dynamicConfig. Shows a PasswordInput when viewSpec.type is 'password'.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'base' for a string or number field
When the viewSpec.type is 'password' for a masked text input
avoid: Do not use for multi-line text — use TextArea instead
Do not use for code editing — use MonacoInput instead

props.name: spec
props.description: String or number spec; viewSpec.type='password' switches to PasswordInput. viewSpec.disabled and viewSpec.placeholder are applied to the input.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA attribute on the input element.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing current value and change/focus/blur handlers.

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Additional GravityUI TextInput props (excluding value, onBlur, onFocus, onUpdate, disabled, placeholder, qa).

name: TextArea
description: A string input component that renders a GravityUI TextArea with 8–20 rows. Used as the 'textarea' string input type in dynamicConfig. Passes through additional TextArea props via inputProps.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'textarea' for a string field
When the user needs to enter multi-line text
avoid: Do not use for single-line text — use Text instead
Do not use for code — use MonacoInput instead

props.name: spec
props.description: String spec; viewSpec.disabled and viewSpec.placeholder are applied to the TextArea.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA attribute on the TextArea element.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing current string value and change/focus/blur handlers.

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Additional GravityUI TextArea props (excluding value, onBlur, onFocus, onUpdate, disabled, placeholder, qa). minRows defaults to 8, maxRows to 20.

name: TextContent
description: A string independent input that renders static display content derived from viewSpec.textContentParams or viewSpec.layoutDescription. Can render as an Alert, a Label, or plain text with an optional icon. Used as the 'text_content' string input type in dynamicConfig.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'text_content' for a string field
When a static informational text, alert, or label should be embedded in the form
avoid: Do not use for editable text — use Text or TextArea instead

props.name: spec
props.description: String spec with viewSpec.textContentParams: text (HTML string), themeAlert (renders Alert with given theme), viewAlert, titleAlert, themeLabel (renders Label), icon (lazy-loaded GravityUI icon name), iconColor. Falls back to viewSpec.layoutDescription if textContentParams.text is absent.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name; used when wrapping the Layout component.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object; input.value is shown alongside the static text in plain text mode.

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the rendered content.

name: Transparent
description: A pass-through layout component that renders children without any visual wrapper. Used as the 'transparent' layout type in dynamicConfig to suppress any layout chrome around a field.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.layout is 'transparent'
When a field should render without any label, title, or container
avoid: Do not use when a label or title is needed — use Row or Section instead

props.name: children
props.description: The input content rendered without any layout wrapper.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA on the remove button (if array item).

props.name: spec
props.description: Spec used to detect array/object type for error wrapper styling and to check generate button flag.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object; onDrop used for array item removal.

props.name: meta
props.description: Final Form meta object passed to ErrorWrapper for validation feedback.

name: useErrorChecker
description: A hook that automatically opens a collapsible container when the form is submitted and a validation error exists inside it. Accepts the field name, meta object, current open state, and a setOpen callback.
when_to_use: When building a collapsible container that should auto-expand on submit errors for fields inside it
avoid: Do not use outside of a dynamic-forms form context — it depends on Final Form meta
signature: useErrorChecker({ name: string, meta: FieldRenderProps<FieldValue>['meta'], open: boolean, setOpen: (flag: boolean) => void }): void

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The field name to look for in form error elements.

parameters.name: meta
parameters.description: Final Form meta object providing submitFailed state.

parameters.name: open
parameters.description: Current open state of the collapsible container.

parameters.name: setOpen
parameters.description: Callback to change the open state.

name: useOneOf
description: A hook that manages the toggler logic for oneOf-style object inputs. Determines the toggler type (radio, select, card, checkbox, or switch) based on the number of options and viewSpec.oneOfParams. Returns the current selected key, spec properties map, the rendered toggler element, and the raw toggler input.
when_to_use: When building a custom oneOf input component that needs the toggler logic
When the built-in OneOf, CardOneOf patterns need to be extended
avoid: Do not use for multi-select scenarios — this hook manages single active property selection
signature: useOneOf({ props: ObjectIndependentInputProps, onTogglerChange?: (value: string) => void }): { oneOfValue: string, specProperties: Record<string, Spec>, toggler: React.ReactNode, togglerInput: React.ReactNode }

parameters.name: props
parameters.description: The full props of the parent object input component.

parameters.name: onTogglerChange
parameters.description: Optional callback fired when the selected property changes.

return_type: { oneOfValue: string, specProperties: Record<string, Spec>, toggler: React.ReactNode, togglerInput: React.ReactNode }

name: dynamicConfig
description: The default DynamicFormConfig object that maps all built-in input, layout, and validator components to their spec type and viewSpec.type keys. Pass this to DynamicField as the config prop to use all standard form components out of the box.
when_to_use: When setting up DynamicField with the default set of input and layout components
As the starting point to extend with custom inputs or layouts
avoid: Do not pass to DynamicView — use dynamicViewConfig instead
examples:
import { DynamicField, dynamicConfig } from '@gravity-ui/dynamic-forms';

<DynamicField name="myField" spec={mySpec} config={dynamicConfig} />

name: dynamicViewConfig
description: The default DynamicViewConfig object that maps all built-in view and view-layout components to their spec type and viewSpec.type keys. Pass this to DynamicView as the config prop to use all standard view components out of the box.
when_to_use: When setting up DynamicView with the default set of view and layout components
avoid: Do not pass to DynamicField — use dynamicConfig instead
examples:
import { DynamicView, dynamicViewConfig } from '@gravity-ui/dynamic-forms';

<DynamicView spec={mySpec} config={dynamicViewConfig} value={formValues} />

name: getArrayValidator
description: A factory function that returns a validator for ArraySpec fields. Validates required, maxLength, and minLength constraints. Accepts optional ignore flags and customErrorMessages to override default error strings.
when_to_use: When registering a custom array validator in a DynamicFormConfig
When customizing the built-in array validation rules
avoid: Do not use for non-array spec types — use the corresponding getXxxValidator instead
signature: getArrayValidator(params?: GetArrayValidatorParams): (spec: ArraySpec, value?: ArrayValue) => string | false

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional flags to skip specific checks and custom error messages.

name: getBooleanValidator
description: A factory function that returns a validator for BooleanSpec fields. Validates the required constraint. Accepts optional ignoreRequiredCheck and customErrorMessages.
when_to_use: When registering a custom boolean validator in a DynamicFormConfig
signature: getBooleanValidator(params?: GetBooleanValidatorParams): (spec: BooleanSpec, value?: boolean) => string | false

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional flags and custom error messages.

name: getNumberValidator
description: A factory function that returns a validator for NumberSpec fields. Validates required, maximum, minimum, int64 format, leading/trailing spaces, zero-start, and other numeric format rules. Each check can be individually disabled via ignore flags.
when_to_use: When registering a custom number validator in a DynamicFormConfig
When customizing numeric validation rules such as disabling integer-only check
signature: getNumberValidator(params?: GetNumberValidatorParams): (spec: NumberSpec, value?: string | number) => string | false

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional ignore flags for each numeric check and custom error messages.

name: getObjectValidator
description: A factory function that returns a validator for ObjectSpec fields. Validates the required constraint. Accepts optional ignoreRequiredCheck and customErrorMessages.
when_to_use: When registering a custom object validator in a DynamicFormConfig
signature: getObjectValidator(params?: GetObjectValidatorParams): (spec: ObjectSpec, value?: ObjectValue) => string | false

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional flags and custom error messages.

name: Accordeon
description: A layout component that wraps field content in a SimpleVerticalAccordeon with an animated expand/collapse toggle. Supports layoutOpen to set the initial open state, layoutTitle as the header text, layoutDescription as a help mark tooltip, and variantTitle to override typography. Auto-opens on submit errors via useErrorChecker. Shows a remove button for array items.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.layout is 'accordeon' for any field type
When field content should be placed inside a toggleable accordion with a title header
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when always-expanded layout is needed — use Section or CardSection instead

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA on the accordion toggler and remove button.

props.name: spec
props.description: Spec providing layoutTitle, layoutDescription, layoutOpen (initial state), and layoutProps.variantTitle.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object; onDrop used for array item removal.

props.name: meta
props.description: Final Form meta used by useErrorChecker to auto-open on submit errors.

props.name: children
props.description: Field content rendered inside the accordion body.

name: ArrayBaseView
description: Read-only view variant of ArrayBase. Renders each array item using the item sub-spec via ViewController, appending the item index to layoutTitle. Supports optional itemPrefix labels between items. Returns null when the item spec is not valid.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'base' for an array field inside DynamicView
When displaying a read-only list of array values driven by a spec
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when an editable array is needed — use ArrayBase with DynamicField instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Array spec with items sub-spec and optional viewSpec.itemPrefix label between items.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used as prefix for child view controller names.

props.name: value
props.description: Current array value; defaults to empty array.

name: BaseView
description: Read-only view variant for boolean, number, and string fields. Renders the value as a string, using spec.description to map enum values to display labels. When a linkValue is provided (string fields with viewSpec.link), renders the link content instead of the raw value.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'base' for a string, boolean, or number field inside DynamicView
When displaying a read-only scalar value
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when an editable field is needed — use Text, Checkbox, or NumInput with DynamicField instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Spec providing description map for enum label lookups.

props.name: value
props.description: The value to display.

props.name: linkValue
props.description: When provided, renders this link content instead of the raw string value.

name: CardAccordeon
description: A layout component that wraps field content in a Card with collapsible accordion behavior. Uses viewSpec.layoutOpen as initial state, layoutTitle as the card title, and layoutDescription as a tooltip. Auto-opens on submit errors via useErrorChecker. Shows a remove button for array items.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.layout is 'card_accordeon' for any field type
When a collapsible card layout with a visible titled header is needed
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when a non-collapsible card is needed — use CardSection instead

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA and remove button.

props.name: spec
props.description: Spec providing layoutTitle, layoutDescription, and layoutOpen (initial open state).

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object; onDrop used for array item removal.

props.name: meta
props.description: Final Form meta used by useErrorChecker to auto-open on submit errors.

props.name: children
props.description: Field content rendered inside the card body.

name: CardOneOfView
description: Read-only view variant of CardOneOf. Renders the selected oneOf option label (from spec.description or layoutTitle) inside a Card container, followed by the nested view of the selected sub-spec.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'card_oneof' for an object field inside DynamicView
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when an editable oneOf is needed — use CardOneOf with DynamicField instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Object spec with properties and description map for option labels.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used as prefix for child view controller names.

props.name: value
props.description: Current object value; the first key determines which sub-spec is displayed.

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the card.

name: CardSection
description: A layout component that wraps field content in an always-open Card with a title, optional description tooltip, and an optional remove button for array items. Unlike CardAccordeon, the card body is never collapsible.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.layout is 'card_section' for any field type
When a non-collapsible card container with a title is needed
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when a collapsible card is needed — use CardAccordeon instead

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA and remove button.

props.name: spec
props.description: Spec providing layoutTitle and layoutDescription.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object; onDrop used for array item removal.

props.name: meta
props.description: Final Form meta passed to ErrorWrapper.

props.name: children
props.description: Field content rendered inside the always-open card.

name: CheckboxGroupView
description: Read-only view variant of CheckboxGroup. Renders the selected array values as a group of disabled GravityUI checkboxes derived from the spec's enum. Supports horizontal or vertical placement via viewSpec.checkboxGroupParams.placement.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'checkbox_group' for an array field inside DynamicView
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when an editable checkbox group is needed — use CheckboxGroup with DynamicField instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Array spec with enum and optional description for labels. viewSpec.checkboxGroupParams.placement controls layout direction.

props.name: value
props.description: Current array of selected values.

name: Column
description: A vertical layout component that stacks the field title on top and the input below. Shows a HelpMark tooltip for layoutDescription. Includes an inline remove button for array items and a GenerateRandomValueButton for eligible string fields. Similar to Row but with a top-label instead of side-label arrangement.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.layout is 'column' for any field type
When the label should appear above the input rather than to its left
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when a side-by-side label-input layout is needed — use Row instead

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA on the remove button and to detect array item status.

props.name: spec
props.description: Spec providing layoutTitle, layoutDescription, required flag, and withGenerateButton flag.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object; onDrop used for array item removal.

props.name: meta
props.description: Final Form meta passed to ErrorWrapper for validation feedback.

props.name: children
props.description: The input element rendered below the title.

name: CopyButton
description: A utility component that renders a GravityUI ClipboardButton to copy string or number field values to the clipboard. Only renders when the spec is a string or number type with viewSpec.copy set to true. Intended to be placed alongside a view field.
when_to_use: When viewSpec.copy is true on a string or number field and a copy-to-clipboard action is needed
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use for non-string/number specs — renders nothing in that case

props.name: spec
props.description: Spec; must be a StringSpec or NumberSpec with viewSpec.copy=true for the button to render.

props.name: value
props.description: The value that will be copied to the clipboard as a string.

name: DateView
description: Read-only view variant of DateInput. Renders a date or datetime string value formatted using the spec's printFormat and timeZone from viewSpec.dateInput. Converts timestamp objects to a human-readable date string.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'date_input' for a string field inside DynamicView
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when an editable date input is needed — use DateInput with DynamicField instead

props.name: spec
props.description: String spec with viewSpec.dateInput providing printFormat and timeZone for display formatting.

props.name: value
props.description: Current date/datetime string or timestamp value to display.

name: FileInputView
description: Read-only view variant of FileInput. Renders the stored file content string value using LongValue, or an empty state when no value is present.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'file_input' for a string field inside DynamicView
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when an editable file upload is needed — use FileInput with DynamicField instead

props.name: spec
props.description: String spec for the file field.

props.name: value
props.description: The file content string to display.

name: GenerateRandomValueButton
description: A utility button component that calls a generateRandomValue function (from DynamicField context) and writes the result into a string field via onChange. Only renders when both the generateRandomValue context function is available and viewSpec.generateRandomValueButton is true.
when_to_use: When viewSpec.generateRandomValueButton is true on a string field and the DynamicField has a generateRandomValue prop
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use outside of a dynamic-forms context — depends on the generateRandomValue hook

props.name: spec
props.description: String spec with viewSpec.generateRandomValueButton=true.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback to write the generated value into the field.

name: LazyLoader
description: A utility wrapper around React.Suspense that renders a lazily loaded component. After the lazy component resolves, it uses the resolved module as the fallback for subsequent renders to avoid showing a blank fallback on re-renders. Accepts a React.lazy exoticComponent and an optional initialFallback.
when_to_use: When wrapping a lazily imported component with a Suspense boundary that avoids blank-flash on re-renders
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use for non-lazy components — just use them directly

props.name: component
props.description: A React.lazy component to render inside Suspense.

props.name: initialFallback
props.description: Fallback shown before the lazy component resolves; defaults to an empty Fragment.

name: LongValue
description: A display utility component that renders a text value and expands it on click when the text overflows its container. Uses an IntersectionObserver to detect overflow on initially hidden elements. Wraps GravityUI Text and forwards all TextProps.
when_to_use: When displaying a potentially long string value that should be truncated with a click-to-expand behavior
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use for structured or multi-field values — use the appropriate view component

props.name: value
props.description: The value to display as text.

props.name: onClick
props.description: Optional additional click handler called alongside the expand toggle.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the root element.

examples:
import { LongValue } from '@gravity-ui/dynamic-forms';

<LongValue value="This is a potentially very long description that will be truncated on overflow" />

name: MonacoInputView
description: Read-only view variant of MonacoInput. Renders the code value inside a read-only Monaco editor with an optional expand-to-dialog button. Requires a Monaco editor component passed via DynamicView's Monaco prop or context.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'monaco_input' for a string field inside DynamicView
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use without providing a Monaco editor component — renders nothing if missing

props.name: spec
props.description: String spec with viewSpec.monacoParams (language, fontSize, etc.).

props.name: value
props.description: The code string to display in the read-only editor.

name: MultiOneOfView
description: Read-only view variant of MultiOneOf. Renders the list of active sub-property labels (from spec.description or layoutTitle) with Popover truncation, and renders the nested view for each active sub-spec below. Supports withoutIndent via MultiOneOfFlatView.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'multi_oneof' or 'multi_oneof_flat' for an object field inside DynamicView
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when an editable multi-oneof is needed — use MultiOneOf with DynamicField instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Object spec with properties and description map for option labels.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used as prefix for child view controller names.

props.name: value
props.description: Current object value; each key present is treated as an active property.

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the label list.

props.name: withoutIndent
props.description: When true removes GroupIndent from the nested sub-spec views (used by MultiOneOfFlatView).

name: MultiSelectView
description: Read-only view variant of MultiSelect. Renders the selected array values as a series of GravityUI Labels, using spec.description to map enum keys to display text.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'select' for an array field inside DynamicView
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when an editable multi-select is needed — use MultiSelect with DynamicField instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Array spec with enum and optional description map for display labels.

props.name: value
props.description: Current selected values array.

name: NumberWithScaleView
description: Read-only view variant of NumberWithScale. Renders the scaled numeric value alongside its unit label. Converts the stored base-unit value using the sizeParams scale map. Returns null when sizeParams are missing or the value is empty.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'number_with_scale' for a string field inside DynamicView
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when an editable number-with-scale is needed — use NumberWithScale with DynamicField instead

props.name: spec
props.description: String spec with viewSpec.sizeParams (defaultType, scale map) for unit conversion and display.

props.name: value
props.description: The stored base-unit value to convert and display.

name: ObjectBaseView
description: Read-only view variant of ObjectBase. Iterates over the spec's properties and renders a ViewController for each one. Supports viewSpec.order and viewSpec.delimiter. An inline variant ObjectInlineView renders properties side-by-side using filterPropertiesForObjectInline.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'base' or 'inline' for an object field inside DynamicView
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when an editable object is needed — use ObjectBase with DynamicField instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Object spec with properties map. viewSpec.order and viewSpec.delimiter control rendering order and separators.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used as prefix for child view controller names.

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the rendered properties.

props.name: inline
props.description: When true renders only inline-eligible properties side-by-side (used by ObjectInlineView).

name: ObjectValueInput
description: An object input component that exposes only a single sub-property named 'value' (OBJECT_VALUE_PROPERTY_NAME) from the object spec, forcing its layout to 'transparent'. Used for object fields that wrap a single value under a conventional property name.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'object_value' for an object field that wraps a single 'value' property
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when the object has multiple independently selectable properties — use ObjectBase or OneOf instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Object spec that must contain a 'value' sub-property (OBJECT_VALUE_PROPERTY_NAME); its layout is forced to 'transparent'.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name path used as prefix for the 'value' child field name.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing current object value and change handler.

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the child field content.

name: ObjectValueInputView
description: Read-only view variant of ObjectValueInput. Renders the 'value' sub-property (OBJECT_VALUE_PROPERTY_NAME) of the object using ViewController with its layout forced to empty, optionally wrapped in a Layout component.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'object_value' for an object field inside DynamicView
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when an editable object value is needed — use ObjectValueInput with DynamicField instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Object spec containing a 'value' sub-property (OBJECT_VALUE_PROPERTY_NAME).

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used as prefix for the child view controller name.

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the rendered value.

name: OneOfView
description: Read-only view variant of OneOf. Renders the display name of the currently selected oneOf option (using spec.description, layoutTitle, or the key itself), then renders the nested view of the selected sub-spec below. Supports booleanMap for checkbox/switch toggler types. A flat variant OneOfFlatView removes GroupIndent.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'oneof' or 'oneof_flat' for an object field inside DynamicView
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when an editable oneOf is needed — use OneOf with DynamicField instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Object spec with properties and description map for option labels. viewSpec.oneOfParams.booleanMap supported for checkbox/switch togglers.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used as prefix for child view controller names.

props.name: value
props.description: Current object value; the first key determines which sub-spec is displayed.

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the selected option label.

props.name: withoutIndent
props.description: When true removes GroupIndent from the nested sub-spec view (used by OneOfFlatView).

name: SimpleVerticalAccordeon
description: A low-level accordion component with a toggle button header, an animated chevron, an optional note tooltip, and optional branch-view styling. Used internally by the Accordeon layout and AccordeonCard. Supports hideInsteadOfDestroy to keep children mounted when closed, and a viewLayout mode that auto-hides when its body becomes empty.
when_to_use: When building a custom collapsible section that needs the low-level toggle+chevron pattern used by Accordeon
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use for standard form fields — use Accordeon or AccordeonCard instead

props.name: children
props.description: Content rendered inside the accordion body.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA on the toggle button.

props.name: title
props.description: Header title text; shows a Popover tooltip when truncated.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state of the accordion.

props.name: titleSize
props.description: Typography size of the title; defaults to 's'.

props.name: note
props.description: HTML string shown as a HelpMark tooltip in the header.

props.name: openTitle
props.description: Alternative title shown when the accordion is open.

props.name: headerActionsTemplate
props.description: Extra content rendered in the header actions area.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the root element.

props.name: contentClassName
props.description: Additional CSS class for the body element.

props.name: buttonClassName
props.description: Additional CSS class for the toggle button.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Callback fired when the open state changes.

props.name: hideInsteadOfDestroy
props.description: When true hides the body with CSS instead of unmounting it on close.

props.name: withBranchView
props.description: Adds branch-view styling to the left side of the content.

props.name: viewLayout
props.description: When true auto-hides the entire component if its body becomes empty after first render.

props.name: variantTitle
props.description: GravityUI Text variant override for the title.

examples:
import { SimpleVerticalAccordeon } from '@gravity-ui/dynamic-forms';
Content

name: TableArrayView
description: Read-only view variant of TableArrayInput. Renders array items in a GravityUI Table where each column corresponds to a property defined in viewSpec.table. Returns null when table column definitions are missing.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'table' for an array field inside DynamicView
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when an editable table array is needed — use TableArrayInput with DynamicField instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Array spec with viewSpec.table column definitions: {property, label, description?, width?}. Returns null without this.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used as prefix for child cell view controllers.

props.name: value
props.description: Current array of row objects to display.

name: TableCell
description: A minimal layout component used as the cell layout inside TableArrayInput rows. It wraps its children in an ErrorWrapper for validation feedback and nothing else — no title, label, or visual chrome.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.layout is 'table_cell' for fields rendered inside a TableArrayInput row
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use outside of a table array context — use Transparent or Row for regular fields

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used for QA in the ErrorWrapper.

props.name: meta
props.description: Final Form meta passed to ErrorWrapper for validation feedback.

props.name: children
props.description: The cell input content.

name: TextAreaView
description: Read-only view variant of TextArea. Renders the string value as text with ellipsis truncation; values longer than 50 characters show an expand chevron that toggles the full content on click.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'textarea' for a string field inside DynamicView
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when an editable textarea is needed — use TextArea with DynamicField instead

props.name: value
props.description: The text value to display; defaults to empty string.

name: TextContentView
description: Read-only view variant of TextContent. Delegates rendering to the shared TextContentComponent, which can render an Alert, a Label, or plain text derived from viewSpec.textContentParams. Wraps the Layout to pass the field name correctly.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'text_content' for a string field inside DynamicView
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when an editable text content field is needed — use TextContent with DynamicField instead

props.name: spec
props.description: String spec with viewSpec.textContentParams (text, themeAlert, themeLabel, icon, etc.).

props.name: name
props.description: Field name passed to the Layout wrapper.

props.name: value
props.description: Current field value passed to TextContentComponent.

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the static content.

name: TextLink
description: An object input component that exposes only the 'text' sub-property of the object spec, forcing its layout to 'transparent'. Used for object fields that represent a link with a 'text' property containing the displayed text and a separate link URL managed outside the form engine.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'text_link' for an object field with a 'text' string sub-property
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use for plain hyperlink display — use TextLinkView in DynamicView for read-only links

props.name: spec
props.description: Object spec with a 'text' string sub-property; its layout is forced to 'transparent'.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name path used as prefix for the 'text' child field name.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing current object value and change handler.

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the text child field content.

name: TextLinkView
description: Read-only view variant of TextLink. Renders the 'text' sub-property of the object using ViewController, injecting viewSpec.link from the current value to produce a hyperlink. Returns null when the 'text' property spec is missing or the value has no text.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'text_link' for an object field inside DynamicView
When displaying a clickable link from a spec-driven object with a 'text' property
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when an editable link text field is needed — use TextLink with DynamicField instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Object spec with a 'text' string sub-property.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used as prefix for child view controller.

props.name: value
props.description: Object value with 'text' (display text) and 'link' (URL) properties.

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the rendered link.

name: TimeRangeSelector
description: An object input component that renders two linked time-range Select dropdowns for start and end time. Reads the 'startTime' and 'endTime' string sub-properties from the object spec. Filters end-time options to be after the selected start time and vice versa. Requires enum values on both sub-specs.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'time_range_selector' for an object field with 'startTime' and 'endTime' string sub-properties that have enum values
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when the sub-properties are missing or lack enum values — returns null in that case

props.name: spec
props.description: Object spec with 'startTime' and 'endTime' string sub-properties each having enum values. description and selectParams.meta provide display labels.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name path used as prefix for child field names.

props.name: input
props.description: Final Form input object providing current object value and change handler.

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the two time selects.

name: TimeRangeSelectorView
description: Read-only view variant of TimeRangeSelector. Renders the 'startTime' and 'endTime' sub-properties as row-layout view fields using ViewController. Returns null when either sub-spec is missing.
when_to_use: When the viewSpec.type is 'time_range_selector' for an object field inside DynamicView
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use when an editable time range is needed — use TimeRangeSelector with DynamicField instead

props.name: spec
props.description: Object spec with 'startTime' and 'endTime' string sub-properties.

props.name: name
props.description: Field name used as prefix for child view controllers.

props.name: value
props.description: Current object value with startTime and endTime string entries.

props.name: Layout
props.description: Optional layout component wrapping the two time view fields.

name: TogglerCard
description: A selectable card component used as the 'card' toggler variant inside OneOf and CardOneOf. Renders a GravityUI Card in selection mode with a title, secondary text, and an optional description tooltip via HelpMark. Becomes disabled-but-selected when disabled and selected simultaneously.
when_to_use: When viewSpec.oneOfParams.toggler is 'card' for a oneOf field
When building a custom toggler that presents each option as a clickable card
avoid: Part of the dynamic-forms spec-driven engine. Not individual form controls — use uikit for standard forms.
Do not use for non-selection UI — use GravityUI Card directly for display-only cards

props.name: title
props.description: Main title text displayed in the card header (truncated with ellipsis).

props.name: text
props.description: Secondary descriptive text displayed in the card body.

props.name: onClick
props.description: Callback fired when the card is clicked.

props.name: selected
props.description: Whether this card is the currently selected option.

props.name: description
props.description: Optional HTML description shown in a HelpMark tooltip in the header.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When true and not selected, disables click interaction.

examples:
<TogglerCard
  title="HTTP"
  text="Use HTTP endpoint for the connection"
  selected={oneOfValue === 'http'}
  onClick={() => handleSelect('http')}
/>

name: getStringValidator
description: A factory function that returns a validator for StringSpec fields. Validates required, maxLength, minLength, pattern (regex), and leading/trailing space rules. Each check can be individually disabled via ignore flags.
when_to_use: When registering a custom string validator in a DynamicFormConfig
When customizing string validation rules such as disabling the pattern check
signature: getStringValidator(params?: GetStringValidatorParams): (spec: StringSpec, value?: string) => string | false

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Optional ignore flags for each string check and custom error messages.
